resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete %s?
Are you sure you want to delete %d mods?
This version is no longer supported. Please update before continuing.
Update information is unavailable. Please try again later.
Not connected to the internet. Please check your device\'s network connection!
The input is invalid, please try again
The name contains an invalid character: "%s"
The value is too small, it must be at least %s
The value is too big, it can be at most %s
Create a copy of this version
Current modifications will not be saved. Are you sure you want to exit?
Tap Gear icon ⚙ to open CS Controls Menu
This is the default CS Launcher control layout.
Set this layout as default for CS Launcher?
No layouts found. Restart CS Launcher to generate default.
Long press layout to set as default!
OptiFine might crash with Forge versions.
Close logs if device lags during install.
Deleting will remove all version files. Backup recommended!
Invalid version JSON. Delete to fix.
Remove this favorite? Info will be cleared.
Failed to download Minecraft! Check your connection.
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
Touch Controller (%s) detected, enabling CS proxy.
Sodium/Embeddium (%s) detected. Applying Android crash fix.
Physics mod (%s) unpatched — fix required for arm64.
MCEF (%s) is not compatible with Android.
Valkyrien Skies (%s) requires a separate server.
Yes Steve Model (%s) is incompatible with Android.
IMBlocker (%s) will crash Android on startup.
Borderless Window (%s) is incompatible with Android.
CS Launcher requires file management permission.
CS Launcher requires storage permission to save game files.
Renderer plugin %s requires storage access for settings.
CS Launcher requires external storage permission to function.
CS Launcher needs notification permission to maintain background downloads.
CS Launcher will remove the path entry but not the actual files.
Modifications will be lost. Exit anyway?
No mods found. Add mods or download from the internet.
Remove this account from CS Launcher?
Remove this login method from CS Launcher?
Login failed. Continue in offline mode?
A premium Microsoft account is recommended for CS Launcher.
Offline accounts are for backup use only.
Using a third-party login without premium?
Purchase on the official minecraft.net site.
It seems you don\'t have an Xbox Live account
Adult verification required for your account
Your account is a child account, needs family access
Xbox Live is not available in your country/region
Please ensure you have purchased Minecraft and try again
No compatible JRE found. Requires Java %d or later
Java 8 not found. Install Java 8 to use this option
Open virtual mouse management to add custom mouse icons
Default virtual mouse — share, rename, and delete not supported
Changing grid size will clear the canvas. Continue?
Manage background images for different CS Launcher interfaces
Tap "Select" to set this image as background for %s
No background images found. Please add some first!
Please select a file with extension %s
This folder (or file) does not exist
Are you sure you want to delete this file?
Are you sure you want to delete this folder?
Deleting this folder will also delete all files inside. Cancel if it contains important files!
This will permanently delete all selected items. Proceed with caution!
File name conflicts with an existing file!
CS Launcher needs to extract essential game libraries. Tap below to begin.
CS Launcher is extracting components. Opening main interface soon…
CS Launcher (full name Craft Studio Launcher) is a high-performance Minecraft launcher by Craft Studio Team, based on PojavLauncher and optimized for Android devices.
CS Launcher focuses on premium user experience, featuring a redesigned UI for easy Minecraft access on any Android device.
CS Launcher is licensed under GPL v3.0. Please comply with open-source provisions when distributing modified versions.
Special Thanks to Craft Studio Team Supporters:
All sponsors who support CS Launcher development — thank you!
MC Wiki — Mod and modpack translations
ShirosakiMio — Technical support and bug fixes
Import renderer plugins locally. Some devices may not support local renderer plugins.
New renderer imported. Restart CS Launcher to load it!
Failed to import renderer plugin. Check file format or plugin conflicts!
Delete this renderer plugin? This cannot be undone!
Ignore notch and extend screen content to fullscreen
Extend screen to fullscreen on non-game interfaces
May improve performance on GPU-limited devices
Prevent overheating by limiting peak performance
Enable V-Sync for Zink using internal system APIs
Force system Vulkan driver on Adreno GPUs instead of Turnip
Change delay for long press actions like breaking blocks
Enlarge buttons if they are too small
Modify the size of the virtual mouse
Modify the movement speed of the virtual mouse
Show Virtual Mouse by Default on Game Start
Virtual mouse will appear on startup when enabled
Disable gestures such as long press to break blocks
Disable Double Tap to Swap Items
Disable double tapping hotbar item to swap with off-hand
Use All Caps in Button Labels
Disable to use lowercase letters in control layout
Rotate your device to rotate camera in-game
Increase if you experience gyroscope performance issues
Modify keyboard keys bound to each controller button
Java runtime to use before entering execution environment
Additional JVM arguments for launching Minecraft. Modify carefully to avoid crashes.
Control how much memory is allocated to Minecraft
Enable sandbox security manager when executing .jar files
Forces hash check on libraries to prevent download errors
Logs converted shaders to log file
Forces Minecraft rendering thread to run on highest frequency core
Set vibration duration for TouchController mod
Check game version list and libraries when enabled
Cache cover images and screenshots for faster loading
Add full resource name as prefix to custom file name on download
Max concurrent downloads. 64 threads is sufficient!
Custom info shown in F3 debug screen. Use [cs_version] for CS Launcher version tag.
Automatically set game language on startup
Force game language to match CS Launcher language
Open Log Output When Launching Game
Enable log output interface when game starts
Set the speed of launcher animations
Set opacity of main pages in CS Launcher
Quit CS Launcher when game officially starts
Allow CS Launcher to receive pre-release updates
Re-request notification permissions for background downloads
Show real-time memory info on game menu
Show real-time FPS on game menu
Customize the memory info prefix text
Controls refresh rate of game menu info. High refresh may cause performance issues.
Set opacity of game menu floating window
Restart CS Launcher to apply changes.
Adreno GPU detected. Enabling this may cause Zink to malfunction. Continue?
The app/game aborted due to fatal signal %d.
Check log file or crash report for details. Share logs if you need help!
Do not screenshot the app. Share your log file or crash report!
No suitable runtime found. Using version-selected runtime.
Game is running. Enable log output via menu to check status.
Platform does not support this resource type or category filter!
%s has the following dependencies or incompatible mods
Download required dependencies. Missing or incompatible mods may cause game to fail!
Cannot recognize file structure. Automatic unpacking failed. Please handle manually!
Please select a modpack file supported by CS Launcher!
This modpack is not supported! CS Launcher supports Modrinth, CurseForge, and MCBBS formats.
All mods installed. Preparing mod loader installation.
Check and clean CS Launcher cache files. Clearing does not affect normal app usage.
Cleanup complete. Cleared %s of cache files.
Get and install the latest version
CS Launcher is up to date!
CS Launcher is up to date!
Network error. Unable to check for updates!
Network error. Unable to check for updates! Error code: %d
Latest package downloaded. Install now? Location:
Enter Yggdrasil API authentication server address
Server cannot be empty. Check authentication server settings!
Multiple roles found. Select the role you want to use.
No account? Click here to register!
Role not found for current account. Check if this role exists on your server!
Available memory (%d MB) is lower than allocated (%d MB). Game may crash!
Free memory (%d MB) is less than allocated (%d MB). This will cause a crash!
Are you sure you want to force close CS Launcher?

Tampered version manifest detected.
This is unsafe. Your data may be at risk.
Tap this button to close and return to previous screen.
Tap this button to refresh current content.
Tap to search for your desired control layout!
Tap to open file manager and import your control layout file!
Tap to quickly create a new control layout!
Tap to quickly reset the background image of selected interface.
Tap to open file manager and import your background image!
Tap to open file manager and import your virtual mouse image!
Tap to search for files quickly.
Tap to open file manager and import files into CS Launcher!
Tap to create a new folder in current directory.
Tap to confirm this directory as selection.
Tap to search for your desired mod quickly.
Select a mod file to import it into current mod folder.
Tap to open the mod download page.
Drag the game menu floating window to any position on screen.
CS Launcher is developed and maintained with passion. If you find it helpful and are able to, please consider supporting us to keep improving it. Thank you!
